title: API: make PullPolicy and TerminalPolicy their own types
body: Make PullPolicy and TerminalPolicy their own types, instead of just integer values, so that we can give them a `String()` method, and return more informative errors from a couple of `containerImageSource` methods when they're asked for particular manifest instances, which it doesn't support.

comments.body: Rebased, tweaked how we do the naming of the temporary directory again.

@nalind Getting a little nuts there.
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit bdefbb7 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan bdefbb7bf2db402aa430c916f659002477fa81c7 -->

The main goal is to keep `.` followed by either a digit or `_` from appearing in any component of the pathname, because we're trying to finesse the pathname into part of an image name, and the rules around image names are a bit tighter.
